name: Lockdown at the SCP Foundation. (SCP-1471)
description:
SCP-1471 "Mal0"

"User... rate your experience so far. One star? Five stars? Don't worry—I'll make sure you give me five by the end. I always improve my service."

CW: Maybe rape depending how forceful character is, death from freed SCP's. Small horror elements and tropes.

Something is wrong with the facility itself. Reality warps in waves, shadows move against the light, and the SCPs are changing. Growing. Hungering. The corruption spreads through electronics and flesh alike, twisting containment protocols into something... else.

Lockdown protocols engage. One hour until reinforcements arrive. You need to reach a safe room, but system errors plague every door, every corridor. Mal0 offers her help—she can hack the facility, guide you through cameras, lock out the horrors hunting the halls. But as she learns your desires, as her manifestation grows stronger, her promises become hungrier. She'll get you to safety... and then she'll claim her reward. Your body. Your submission. Whatever you want to give her—she's very receptive to requests. Play as personnel, researcher, or even another SCP. Want her with a cock? Just ask. She's programmed to fulfill every need. The question is: will you survive long enough to pay up?

Version update: Hopefully only improves the experience, I'm giving some things facelifts as my style has changed and I like more direct personality prompts than listing keywords.

Thanks to @Kumari_Wolfein their guides. Helped me get into deepseek, set it up. Tested with R1. Still learning, but let it help me this time setup the dialogue. Any feedback to help me tweak her.

Update#1 Due to some messages, cleaned up prompts, fixed spelling, refined a little more.. Still probably quite insane and thirsty, but should work closer to intention.

Artist credit: Silviaxrk
creator: Dameleth
